summary: On April 5, 2013, the Board discussed the sale of CSC to Pamplona and authorized Mac-Gray management to work with BofA Merrill Lynch to explore transactional opportunities, including with Party A.

summary: On May 9, 2013, the Board formed the Transaction Committee and appointed Thomas Bullock and Paul Daoust to serve as its members, charged with recommending selection of a financial advisor for strategic alternatives review.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "process_kind": "other", "process_scope": null}

summary: On May 30, 2013, based on the recommendation of the Transaction Committee, the Board unanimously approved the engagement of BofA Merrill Lynch as financial advisor for exploration of strategic alternatives, including a potential sale process.
